/usr/bin/g++  -W -Wextra -Wall -pthread -Wsign-compare -Wshadow -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-strict-aliasing -Wno-invalid-offsetof -march=native -Werror -fno-builtin-memcmp -g -DROCKSDB_USE_RTTI CMakeFiles/cache_bench.dir/cache/cache_bench.cc.o CMakeFiles/cache_bench.dir/cache/cache_bench_tool.cc.o -o cache_bench  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jeff-wang/LSM-tuning/comparedDBs/SAunedb/build librocksdb.so.9.4.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread
